title: Refund Policy
content: Customers can request a refund within 7 days of delivery if the product is damaged, defective, or significantly different from the listing. Refunds are processed after verification and usually completed in 5-7 business days.

title: Return Policy
content: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery for eligible products. Items must be in original packaging with all accessories. Some categories such as personal care items are non-returnable unless damaged.

title: Delivery Delay
content: If delivery is delayed beyond 5 days from the promised date, customers may request a cancellation or delivery support investigation. If the delayed order arrives damaged, standard refund rules still apply.

title: Cancellation Policy
content: Orders can be cancelled before shipment from the order page. Once shipped, cancellation may not be possible and customers should use the return process after delivery.

title: Warranty Support
content: Electronics with manufacturer warranty should be serviced via authorized centers after the return window ends. During the return window, customers can request replacement for eligible defects.
